summary: MoE architecture inverts hardware logic — unified memory (Mac M4 Pro 64GB) beats discrete GPU for 120B/12B-active model deployment
No 50M model exists off-the-shelf; SmolLM2-135M is the pragmatic micro, Phi-4-mini/Qwen3.5-4B for nano, Nemotron 3 Super for super
Obsidian vault serves as shared memory bus via 3 layers (embeddings, MCP read/write, graph RAG) mapped to 3 model tiers
Three-stage memory pipeline (capture→process→inject) using hooks, processing in the swarm not in Claude's context window
Ollama alone handles 3-model serving for single user — no custom orchestration needed yet, phased complexity path
